dialogueChunks.intro: Against all odds, you pulled us through. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been stabilized, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_was} saved because you acted when others hesitated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is coordinating the final repairs. {target_npc} has calmed down now that the immediate crisis from {quest_threat_the} has passed. The settlement learned a hard lesson about caution, but at least the lesson wasn't fatal.
dialogueChunks.outro: You turned a disaster into a recovery, {player_name}. The settlement owes you more than they know.

dialogueChunks.intro: The crisis is over, but {quest_focus_the} left lasting damage. Not everything could be saved, and the settlement will feel the consequences for a long time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says {quest_stakes_the} took a heavy blow. The recklessness behind {quest_threat_the} cost us resources, morale, and trust. {target_npc} has promised reforms, but the damage is done. Your intervention prevented total disaster: without it, we'd have lost everything.
dialogueChunks.outro: A costly lesson, but one the settlement will remember. You did everything possible, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Sometimes destruction clears the way for improvement. {quest_focus_The} forced the settlement to rebuild, and the new design is better than what stood before.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} used the crisis as an opportunity to implement safety measures that had been ignored for years. {quest_ally} organized the labor, and the {enemy_type} threat that exploited {quest_threat_the} has been pushed back permanently. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} more secure than ever.
dialogueChunks.outro: What could have been the settlement's worst day became the foundation for its strongest season. That started with you, {player_name}.
